name: Pasta Al Pesto
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pesto: Place basil leaves, garlic, pine nuts, and olive oil in a food processor bowl. Process until smooth, scraping down the sides occasionally. Makes about 1/2 cup.
2. Prepare the vegetables: While the pasta is cooking, heat a skillet with oil over medium heat. Add zucchini slices and stir continuously until crisp-tender.
3. Cook the pasta: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the pasta until al dente. Drain well and toss with the pesto sauce until the noodles are well coated.
4. Finish cooking the vegetables: Add the steamed carrots and peapods to the skillet with oil, stirring until heated through.
5. Combine everything: Transfer the cooked pasta and vegetables to a serving dish. Toss in any remaining pesto, then garnish with freshly ground black pepper and Parmesan cheese, if desired.
Variations:
- Add 3/4 cup grated Parmesan cheese to the pesto for extra flavor.
